title: Arabic Banana Fritters
description: Crunchy banana fritters with a hint of Arabic spices. Perfect as a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: arabic spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cinnamon, cardamom, and ginger

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mash the bananas with a fork until smooth.
2. Add the flour, arabic spices, sugar, eggs, and peanut butter to the bowl. Mix until a thick batter forms.
3. Gradually add the fritter mix to the batter, stirring until just combined.
4. Heat a deep frying pan with 2-3 inches of oil over medium-high heat.
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the oil, about 1/4 cup each.
6. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar, and enjoy!
